creator: destination_wellknown
caption:
My top historical things to see in Berlin 👇

📍Bernauer Strasse to see a big chunk of the Berlin Wall and learn about the history of the divided city

📍Gedenkstätte Berlin-Hohenschönhausen: the Stasi prison where you can get a tour of the prison by former inmates who were held in this East German prison. A tour of the prison is probably one of the most impactful things I’ve ever done in Berlin.

📍Topographie des Terrors: skip the nearby Checkpoint Charlie (or go there for a quick photo) and learn about the cruelty that happened in WW2.

📍Reichstag: It’s iconic to just sit outside and look at this building that has seen so much… You can also visit the dome if you book in advance.

What are your favourite historical sites in Berlin? 🇩🇪

#berlin #berlinwall #thingstodoinberlin #travelguide

transcription.text: Unpopular opinion, but the East Side Gallery is a horrible place in Berlin and definitely not the best place to see the Berlin Wall. Instead of mingling with all the other tourists at East Side Gallery, go to Bernauer Straße where you can learn a lot of cool stuff about the wall and understand Berlin's history way better.
